403.description: Forbidden. You do not have permission to access this resource or to perform this action.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource was not found.

429.description: Too Many Requests. You have exceeded the rate limit. Try again later.

500.description: Internal Server Error. This is a problem with the server that you cannot fix.

post.description: Sign in with OAuth2

providerId.description: The provider ID for the OAuth provider

callbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to after sign in

errorCallbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to if an error occurs

newUserCallbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to after login if the user is new. Eg: "/welcome"

scopes.description: Scopes to be passed to the provider authorization request.

requestSignUp.description: Explicitly request sign-up. Useful when disableImplicitSignUp is true for this provider. Eg: false

schema.description: The state parameter from the OAuth2 request

post.description: Link an OAuth2 account to the current user session

scopes.description: Additional scopes to request when linking the account

errorCallbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to if there is an error during the link process

200.description: Authorization URL generated successfully for linking an OAuth2 account

url.description: The authorization URL to redirect the user to for linking the OAuth2 account

redirect.description: Indicates that the client should redirect to the provided URL
